item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1. Information We Collect

We collect information directly from you when you complete purchases, register user account details, sign up for news letters, or contact our support desks. This includes details like name, shipping addresses, emails, and transaction history.

2. SSL Payment Gateway Encryption

Your payment security is our top priority. We implement 256-bit Secure Socket Layer (SSL) encryption protocols. We do not store raw card numbers, CVVs, or bank logins on our server databases. Payments are handled via tokenized API calls through major international card processors (Stripe, Visa, Mastercard).

3. How We Use Cookies

We use local cookies and storage parameters (LocalStorage) to synchronize shopping carts, wishlist preferences, and dark mode choices on your browser. This improves performance and ensures a smooth user experience.

4. Third-Party Sharing

We do not sell, swap, or trade your personal information with external advertising agencies. We only share details with dropshipping fulfillment centers and international couriers (UPS, FedEx, DHL) to dispatch packages and route shipment tracking updates.

item.title: Refund Policy
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1. Eligibility for Refunds

We provide full transaction refunds under the following parameters:

  • Products containing manufacturing defects or dead battery units.
  • Incorrect variant or gadget model delivered.
  • Unused packaging returned within our 30-day trial guideline.

2. Refund Processing Time

Once our sorting centers receive and inspect your returned package, we approve the request and issue a credit refund. The credit is sent to your original credit card or Stripe token. Refunds settle on statements within 5-7 business days.

3. Non-Refundable Situations

We do not issue credit refunds for devices containing clear physical drops damages, custom firmware mods, or water exposures past IP ratings limits.

item.title: Return Policy
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1. 30-Day trial Guideline

We want you to be fully satisfied with your tech accessory. If you aren't completely happy with your gadget purchase, you can return it within 30 days of arrival for a full refund or exchange. Returning items must be in original condition, including boxes and manuals.

2. Step-by-Step Return Instructions

To start a return, complete these simple steps:

  • Email support@elevora.com with your Order ID and subject "Return Request".
  • Our desk will verify the purchase details and email a prepaid courier return label.
  • Place the gadget back in its box casing, tape the label securely to the external package, and drop it off at the designated courier location.

3. Return Shipping Fees

Elevora provides free return shipping labels for all approved returns containing manufacturing faults. For returns based on a change of mind, a flat return handling fee of $5.99 will be deducted from your final refund credit.

item.title: Shipping Policy
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1. Order Processing Thresholds

Orders are verified, packed, and released to international couriers within 1-2 business days. During peak sale periods, processing may take up to 3 business days.

2. Delivery Methods and Transit Durations

We provide two shipping classes at checkout:

  • Standard Insured Shipping: FREE for all orders above $100 (otherwise flat $9.99). Delivery takes 5-10 business days.
  • Express Courier Service: Flat $9.99. Package departs via priority courier (DHL/FedEx) and arrives in 2-4 business days.

3. Shipment Tracking Codes

Tracking numbers are registered with logistics systems within 24 hours of package departure from our sorting hubs. Enter your code in our "Track Order" portal to view live tracking.

item.title: Terms of Service
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1. Conditions of Website Use

By accessing Elevora's catalog and purchasing accessories, you agree to comply with our purchasing guidelines, return rules, and applicable international commerce regulations.

2. Pricing and Payments

Elevora reserves the right to adjust prices of smart gadgets without notification to accommodate international logistics, material hikes, and dropshipping courier adjustments. If a price adjustment occurs after payment, your order will be filled at the original check-out cost.

3. Intellectual Property Rights

All brand icons, photography layouts, CSS variables, and HTML templates are the proprietary property of Elevora and its developers. Unauthorized copying or redistribution is prohibited.

4. Limitation of Liability

Elevora is not liable for device failures or accessory degradation resulting from improper installations or chargers not complying with official Power Delivery safety standards. Always refer to specifications booklets.

item.title: The Evolution of MagSafe: Snapping Into the Wireless Future
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Inductive wireless charging has existed for years, but standard alignment issues plagued early attempts. Apple's introduction of MagSafe in the iPhone 12 solved the alignment issue by positioning N52 Neodymium magnet loops around central copper charging coils.

The Physics of Induced Coils

When an electromagnetic current flows through a primary transmitter coil, it creates an alternating magnetic field. Placing a receiver coil within this field induces an electrical current in the secondary coil, charging the lithium pack. However, even a minor offset of 2-3 millimeters causes high thermal dissipation and drops efficiency by up to 50%.

"MagSafe's design genius lies in magnets matching the coordinates exactly, ensuring the transmitter and receiver lock at peak efficiency."

Snapping in the Retractable Stands

For dropshipping sites and device developers, MagSafe accessories present high conversion potentials. Magnetic wallets, ring holders, and thin folding powerbanks satisfy both the utility and minimalism metrics that premium consumers actively look for online.
item.excerpt:encoded: Explore the physics behind N52 magnetic coils and how inductive wireless coupling delivers rapid power transfer safely.

item.title: The Evolution of MagSafe: Snapping Into the Wireless Future Cover Image
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: Gallium Nitride (GaN): Why it's replacing silicon charger bricks
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
For decades, silicon has been the bedrock of power transistors. However, as power requirements for laptops, tablets, and smartphones surged, silicon reached its physical thermal caps. Enter Gallium Nitride (GaN)â€”a crystal semiconductor capable of conducting much higher voltages with lower resistance.

Understanding Bandgap Physics

GaN possesses a "wide bandgap" of 3.4 eV compared to silicon's 1.1 eV. This wide bandgap allows electrical currents to pass through components faster, with less energy lost to heat. Consequently, transistors can be placed closer together, reducing charger volume by up to 40%.

"By utilizing GaN, chargers can supply 100W of power from an adapter block smaller than a deck of playing cards."

Cooler Transistors and Multiport Chargers

With less heat loss, chargers don't require heavy heatsinks. This enables developers to pack multiple USB-C Power Delivery ports into travel-friendly charger blocks, protecting gadgets from electrical spikes and heat thresholds.
item.excerpt:encoded: Why are GaN blocks smaller and cooler than old silicon adapters? We outline thermal efficiency and power allocation equations.

item.title: Gallium Nitride (GaN): Why it's replacing silicon charger bricks Cover Image
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation: Sound waves in modern workspaces
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) has evolved from simple isolation cushions to active DSP algorithms. Modern premium headphones utilize hybrid ANC networks to erase distraction noise across workspaces.

Feedforward vs Feedback Microphones

Hybrid ANC combines feedforward microphones (facing outwards to detect ambient noise) and feedback microphones (facing inwards near the ear canal to monitor audio leakage). The digital sound processor (DSP) analyzes these waveforms and projects an inverted soundwave (180 degrees out of phase) to cancel the noise.

"Keep in mind that Hybrid ANC operates like acoustic addition, summing the ambient wave with its inverse mirror image to result in pure silence."

Transparency Mode Integration

By reversing the microphone feeds, hybrid headsets can inject ambient sounds back into the ear cushions. This transparency mode allows consumers to conduct chats or hear announcements without needing to pull the headphones off their ears.
item.excerpt:encoded: Tuning out focus distractions. Discover the microphone structures and algorithms behind phase-reversing soundwave silence.

item.title: Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation: Sound waves in modern workspaces Cover Image
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: AeroPulse ANC Wireless Headphones
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Experience silence perfected. The AeroPulse ANC headphones deliver high-fidelity acoustic performance, class-leading hybrid Active Noise Cancellation, and up to 45 hours of immersive playtime.

Key Features

  • Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation with Transparency Mode
  • Premium memory-foam ear cushions wrapped in protein leather
  • Quad-microphone beamforming array for crystal-clear calls
  • Multipoint connection: Seamlessly switch between laptop and phone

Technical Specifications

Driver Size 40mm Dynamic Driver
Frequency Response 20Hz - 20kHz
Bluetooth Version Bluetooth 5.2 (aptX Adaptive)
Battery Life Up to 45 Hours (ANC Off) / 32 Hours (ANC On)
Charging Port USB-C Fast Charging (10-min charge = 5 hours play)
item.excerpt:encoded: Experience silence perfected. The AeroPulse ANC headphones deliver high-fidelity acoustic performance, class-leading hybrid Active Noise Cancellation, and up to 45 hours of immersive playtime.

item.title: Apex Chrono OLED Smart Watch
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Elevate your health, fitness, and connectivity. Encased in aerospace-grade titanium with an ultra-bright Always-On AMOLED screen, the Apex Chrono monitors biometrics, sleep cycles, and daily performance metrics.

Key Features

  • Continuous Blood Oxygen (SpO2) and Heart Rate Monitoring
  • 120+ specialized tracking modes from running to swimming
  • Offline music storage and Bluetooth calling directly from the wrist
  • Over 150+ customizable premium designer watch faces

Technical Specifications

Display 1.43" Always-On AMOLED, 466x466 pixels, 1000 nits
Water Resistance 5ATM (Up to 50 meters depth)
Sensors Heart Rate, SpO2, Accelerometer, Gyroscope, Barometer
Battery Life Up to 10 days normal usage / 4 days intensive
GPS Dual-Band Multi-system GPS built-in
item.excerpt:encoded: Elevate your health, fitness, and connectivity. Encased in aerospace-grade titanium with an ultra-bright Always-On AMOLED screen, the Apex Chrono monitors biometrics, sleep cycles, and daily performance metrics.

item.title: Apex Chrono OLED Smart Watch Image 1
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: Apex Chrono OLED Smart Watch Image 2
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: Apex Chrono OLED Smart Watch Image 3
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: VoltMag 15W MagSafe Power Bank
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Snap and go. The VoltMag provides a secure magnetic connection for 15W wireless charging, paired with a sleek folding kickstand and a premium rubberized anti-scratch shell.

Key Features

  • Strong N52 neodymium magnets align perfectly with iPhone 12/13/14/15
  • LED digital display tracks remaining battery life down to 1%
  • Smart circuitry protects against over-voltage, short-circuits, and high heat
  • Built-in aluminum alloy kickstand for horizontal or vertical viewing

Technical Specifications

Capacity 10,000mAh Lithium-Polymer
Wireless Output 5W / 7.5W / 10W / 15W MagSafe Compatible
Wired Input/Output USB-C PD 20W Max Input/Output
Dimensions 104 x 68 x 15 mm
Weight 185g
item.excerpt:encoded: Snap and go. The VoltMag provides a secure magnetic connection for 15W wireless charging, paired with a sleek folding kickstand and a premium rubberized anti-scratch shell.

item.title: EchoSphere 360 Portable Speaker
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Rich, room-filling audio in a ruggedly elegant design. Sporting dual passive radiators and custom acoustic drivers, the EchoSphere delivers true 360-degree sound with deep bass and high vocal clarity.

Key Features

  • Acoustic 360 sound projection reaches every corner of the room
  • IPX7 waterproof rating ensures it can survive drops in water, sand, or rain
  • Built-in microphone for hands-free speakerphone calling
  • Dynamic multi-color RGB ambient LED ring synchronized to the music

Technical Specifications

Audio Output 30W Stereo Peak (2x 15W drivers)
Waterproofing IPX7 Certified Waterproof & Dustproof
Playtime Up to 24 Hours on a single charge
Charge Time 3 Hours via USB-C Quick Charge
Connectivity Bluetooth 5.0, AUX 3.5mm, TWS Dual Speaker pairing
item.excerpt:encoded: Rich, room-filling audio in a ruggedly elegant design. Sporting dual passive radiators and custom acoustic drivers, the EchoSphere delivers true 360-degree sound with deep bass and high vocal clarity.

item.title: SoundPod Studio Pro Earbuds
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Redefine sound on the go. Powered by dual-armature drivers, these ultra-compact wireless earbuds provide studio-grade sound quality, customizable equalizer presets, and ergonomic active-fit tips.

Key Features

  • Hi-Res Wireless audio certified with LDAC streaming codec support
  • Active-Fit liquid silicone eartips in 3 sizes for perfect isolation
  • Adaptive ANC dynamically adjusts noise cancellation based on environment
  • Qi wireless charging compatible case with charging status indicator

Technical Specifications

Frequency Response 10Hz - 40kHz (Hi-Res Audio Wireless)
Codecs Supported LDAC, AAC, SBC
IP Rating IPX4 Sweat & Water Resistant
Total Playtime 40 Hours total (8 hrs earbuds + 32 hrs case)
Sensors In-ear detection, Touch controls
item.excerpt:encoded: Redefine sound on the go. Powered by dual-armature drivers, these ultra-compact wireless earbuds provide studio-grade sound quality, customizable equalizer presets, and ergonomic active-fit tips.

item.title: KeyPro mechanical gaming keyboard
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Compact form factor, maximum impact. Built with lubed linear red switches, hot-swappable sockets, and double-shot PBT keycaps, the KeyPro delivers lightning-fast inputs and satisfying typing acoustics.

Key Features

  • Hot-swappable 3/5 pin sockets make modding and changing switches simple
  • Dual-layer acoustic dampening foam absorbs typing echo and ping
  • Double-shot PBT keycaps with anti-oil texture and shine-through legend
  • Tri-mode connectivity pairs up to 3 devices simultaneously

Technical Specifications

Form Factor 75% Compact Layout (84 Keys)
Switch Type Gateron G-Pro Red Linear (Hot-Swappable)
Connectivity Tri-Mode (Bluetooth 5.1 / 2.4GHz Dongle / Wired USB-C)
Backlight South-Facing RGB with 18 animations
Battery Capacity 4000mAh rechargeable lithium
item.excerpt:encoded: Compact form factor, maximum impact. Built with lubed linear red switches, hot-swappable sockets, and double-shot PBT keycaps, the KeyPro delivers lightning-fast inputs and satisfying typing acoustics.

item.title: LuminoSmart Aura Accent Bar
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Transform your living space. Syncing seamlessly with games, movies, and music, the LuminoSmart Aura bathes your desk or media center in stunning, smart multi-color reactive lighting.

Key Features

  • RGBIC technology displays multiple vibrant colors on one light bar concurrently
  • High-sensitivity internal microphone matches light rhythms to audio
  • Voice controlled via Amazon Alexa or Google Home integration
  • Sleek stand mounts horizontally or vertically behind monitors/TVs

Technical Specifications

Light Source RGBIC Dynamic Addressable LEDs
Power Rating 15W Max (5V 3A)
Control Method App Control, Voice Assistant (Alexa/Google), Physical Buttons
Wireless Range Wi-Fi 2.4GHz + Bluetooth 4.2
Length 45cm per Lightbar
item.excerpt:encoded: Transform your living space. Syncing seamlessly with games, movies, and music, the LuminoSmart Aura bathes your desk or media center in stunning, smart multi-color reactive lighting.

item.title: GaNCharge 100W multi-port block
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
One charger to power them all. The GaNCharge 100W replaces bulky bricks, utilizing cutting-edge Gallium Nitride tech to fast charge up to four devices simultaneously including laptops, tablets, and phones.

Key Features

  • GaN II tech offers smaller sizes and better thermal dissipation efficiency
  • Intelligent power allocation distributes wattage optimally between devices
  • Folding wall prongs prevent scratching items when stored in travel bags
  • Built-in protection shields against overcurrent, overcharge, and overheating

Technical Specifications

Total Wattage 100W Max Shared Output
Ports Layout 3x USB-C (PD 3.0) + 1x USB-A (QC 4.0/3.0)
Single Port Output USB-C1/C2 up to 100W (Max)
Technology Gallium Nitride (GaN II) Technology
Dimensions 65 x 65 x 32 mm
item.excerpt:encoded: One charger to power them all. The GaNCharge 100W replaces bulky bricks, utilizing cutting-edge Gallium Nitride tech to fast charge up to four devices simultaneously including laptops, tablets, and phones.

item.title: FlexiPlug: 2Pcs - 3-in-1 Foldable Multiplug Adapter with 180Â° Rotation
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Charge smarter with less clutter and more flexibility. FlexiPlug is designed to solve one of the most common everyday problemsâ€”limited charging points. This compact foldable plug adapter turns a single wall socket into a 3-in-1 power solution, letting you charge multiple devices at once without messy extensions.

Key Features

  • 3-in-1 Power Expansion - Converts one socket into three to charge multiple devices
  • 180Â° Rotating Head - Adjusts easily to fit tight spaces and behind furniture
  • Foldable Plug Design - Compact, easy to carry while traveling
  • Clutter-Free Charging - Eliminates the need for bulky extension boards
  • Durable & Fire-Resistant Build - Made with high-quality materials for safety

Technical Specifications

Power Expansion 3-in-1 Output
Rotation 180Â° Rotating Head
Design Slim, Foldable Plug
Material Durable & Fire-Resistant
Portability Travel-Friendly Lightweight
item.excerpt:encoded: Charge smarter with less clutter and more flexibility. FlexiPlug is designed to solve one of the most common everyday problemsâ€”limited charging points. This compact foldable plug adapter turns a single wall socket into a 3-in-1 power solution, letting you charge multiple devices at once without messy extensions.
